name: mary-workflow
description: Cycle-aware milestone workflows and independent research-paper pipeline state for Codex.

interface.longDescription: Mary Workflow packages a stable v2.1 milestone engine plus v2.2 research-skill foundations for independent paper states, project briefs, interviewed planning, automatic execution and review, debug recovery, cycle archives, and audit-friendly action updates through separate .mary-workflow and .mary-research workspaces.
